gh_6f4d0a1c5dabd825edd7a35f.title: REO: Senior iOS Engineer
gh_6f4d0a1c5dabd825edd7a35f.description: **Tags:** #ios #swift #ui #ci&cd #functional-programming #design #senior #engineer #digital-nomad #ios **Published on:** October 27, 2021 **Original Job Post:** https://remoteOK.io/remote-jobs/106857-remote-senior-ios-engineer-reo ![](https://remoteOK.io/assets/img/jobs/106731f8263f217e92b5530e393aa1b21635330341.png) At [REO](http://reo.so) we want to help real estate brokers, owners and buyers find and trade properties easier than ever. We believe that easy-to-use software is key in this complex and fast-paced industry. We are looking for a Senior iOS Engineer to further accelerate our development. We offer a competitive salary and REO stock options (ESOP) making you a true owner in our vision. ## Your responsibilities Take ownership during refinement and planning to break down new epics into small deliverables. Participate in the design process to jointly deliver the product quickly and with high quality. Ship features every two weeks or quicker. Responsible for the quality of the iOS app and proposing strategic and lasting improvements. ## Your profile You have experience in Swift, programmatic UI, and basic reactive programming. You like learning quickly and seeing the impact that your work has. You consider the perspective of the user and company, when proposing new ideas. Why we do something is just as important as what we do. You have extensive experience in testing and in building up a CI/CD pipeline. You are driven by real impact of your work. You don't require a large team to make things happen. ## Technical Stack 100 % Swift Vanilla SwiftUI with UIKit wrappers Combine Apollo iOS (GraphQL Client) SPM Semaphore ## Culture At REO we put a lot of emphasis on impact, speed, and user value. We also take time to find better ways to work, use new tools and adopt new technologies — for us, this is an essential part of work. Knowledge shares happen every 4 weeks and everyone can present their topic of choice. We are based in [Berlin](https://www.google.com/maps/place/Niebuhrstra%C3%9Fe+78,+10629+Berlin/@52.5039463) but are a distributed team. Learn more about how we work and what we strive for at our [careers page](https://reo.so/careers). Do you have questions or want to get in touch? Send us a line to [[email protected]](mailto:[email protected]) Be sure to mention the words **POPULAR BEACH JOURNEY** when applying to show you read the job post completely. This is a beta feature to avoid spam applicants. Companies can search these words to find applicants that read this and see they're human. #Salary and compensation No salary data published by company so we estimated salary based on previous jobs related to . $60,000 — $100,000/year ### Location 🌏 Worldwide
